title: Add workform responses to item description field
excerpt:

posts.author: ed.cupaioli (Ed)
posts.cookedHtml:
Background
I’m a web developer and I need to create an intake form that gets me all the information I need to complete a request. I have created a form, connected it to a board, and added the necessary automations to add a status and tag me. However, the responses get mapped to columns and they do not support

Expected Behavior
As a monday.com user I would expect form responses to be mapped to an item description as it does in other project management software.

Basically, this forum post should appear the same way it does on my board. I would select the item as see all the details of the workform request in the description.

Actual Behavior
Workform responses are populated into corresponding columns, which make it difficult to read large bodies of text and I have to wade through non-applicable columns since I have one form with conditionals.

posts.author: pbiolsi (Pete)
posts.cookedHtml: Fully agree here Ed. Is there a reason this is a discussion and not a Feature Request?
